name: Implement Feature
description: Plan a feature, implement core logic and tests in parallel, validate the result, and clean up the code.

config.prompt: Create a detailed implementation plan for the feature. Break into concrete steps with file changes.
Implement the core feature following the plan. Write clean, tested code.
Write comprehensive unit tests for the planned feature.
Run all tests and validate the implementation matches the plan. Fix any issues.
Refactor for code quality. Remove debug code. Add necessary comments.
